title: Secure distribution partner/steward + final guardrail + dual sign-off verification
context: Securing a real distribution partner/steward for ewing-survivorship-late-effects and running the final guardrail + dual sign-off verification before any publication. HIGH risk-tier: no HIGH-risk health content publishes to an unvetted channel. Driven by the dated recruitment plan; verifiedNeed flips to true only once a real partner is secured.
objective: Secure a distribution partner/steward and complete the final guardrail + dual sign-off verification gating publication.
acceptanceCriteria: A real survivorship clinic / sarcoma-or-AYA advocacy org is secured as distribution partner; steward assigned; verifiedNeed flips to true
Final verification: all published content carries dual sign-off; cancer data guardrails + copyright firewall + no-PII stance confirmed

Driven by the dated plan; if no partner by ~2027-03-31, apply the build-vs-mothball/pivot rule (pivot to a trusted patient-education publisher or mothball to maintenance-only, recorded in governance) - never publish HIGH-risk health content to no vetted channel
